title: Learn Fares lesson by lesson.
description: Study fare topics in focused lessons, take a mini quiz, review wrong answers, and finish with a mixed Fares test using every loaded original question.

lessons.title: Fare Basics
lessons.intro: Start with the core ideas: fare receipt, basic charges, and passenger expectations.
lessons.memoryTrick: Receipt and basic fare questions are about clarity and honesty.
commonMistakes: Mixing receipt duties with extra-charge rules
Assuming tips or change can be kept automatically

lessons.title: Standard, Premium and Special Rates
lessons.intro: Learn when standard, premium and special rates apply.
lessons.memoryTrick: Standard is normal weekday daytime. Premium is nights/Sundays. Special is Christmas/New Year and special periods.

lessons.title: Tariff A and Tariff B
lessons.intro: Learn where Tariff A ends and Tariff B begins.
lessons.memoryTrick: A comes first. B begins after the threshold.
commonMistakes: Mixing Tariff A amount with distance/time threshold

lessons.title: Time vs Distance Charging
lessons.intro: Understand when a fare is charged by journey time instead of distance.
lessons.memoryTrick: Slow traffic means time. Below 21.2 km/h means time charging.

lessons.title: Extra Charges
lessons.intro: Know valid extra charges: booking, tolls, children/passengers, soiling and what cannot be charged.
lessons.memoryTrick: Extras need a rule. Luggage is not an extra.
commonMistakes: Forgetting tolls must be included on receipt

lessons.title: Taximeter Rules
lessons.intro: Learn taximeter start, visibility, calibration and fitting rules.
lessons.memoryTrick: Meter must be visible, fitted, calibrated and used correctly.
commonMistakes: Confusing calibration with general vehicle safety

lessons.title: Fixed Payment Offences
lessons.memoryTrick: Read the offence wording carefully before choosing the amount.
commonMistakes: Guessing instead of using exact offence wording

lessons.title: Customer Service and Driver Rights
lessons.intro: Passenger communication, routes, refusal rights and professional behaviour.

lessons.title: Final Mixed Fares Test
lessons.memoryTrick: Read facts first, topic second, answer last.
commonMistakes: Answering from memory without reading the wording
